---
title: Publications
date: 2017-12-08
---


<div>
<h2>
<span>Published (*peer-reviewed)</span>
</h2>
</div> 

- (*)A Race to the Middle. The Politics of Interstate Cost Distribution and Welfare State Expansion. The Journal of Politics, conditional accept
- (*)[Measuring the Impacts of Colonialism: A New Data Set for the Countries of Africa and Asia. Journal of World-Systems Research, 23(1), 2017, 156-190 (with Patrick Ziltener and Daniel Kuenzler)](http://jwsr.pitt.edu/ojs/index.php/jwsr/article/download/683/937)

<div>
<h2>
<span>Other Publications (*peer-reviewed)</span>
</h2>
</div> 

- (*)[Europäische Integration auf Unternehmensebene: Die Schweizer Beteiligung an Europäischen Betriebsräten (EBR). Swiss Journal of Sociology, 42(1), 2016, p. 159–174 (with Patrick Ziltener and Heinz Gabathuler)](https://www.degruyter.com/view/j/sjs.2016.42.issue-1/sjs-2016-0008/sjs-2016-0008.xml)
- (*)[QCA, the Truth Table Analysis and Large-N Survey Data: The Benefits of Calibration and the Importance of Robustness Tests. \textit{COMPASSS WP Series} 2014-79. (with Patrick Emmenegger and Dominik Schraff)](http://www.compasss.org/wpseries/EmmeneggerSchraffWalter2014.pdf)

<div>
<h2>
<span>Unter Review</span>
</h2>
</div>  

- A Disproportional Threat. The Adoption of Proportional Representation in Switzerland (with Patrick Emmenegger), R\&R
- Taking the Initiative! Direct Democracy, Coalition Governments and Welfare State Expansion, under review
- Swiss Cantonal Governments 1848-2017. A new Dataset. (with Patrick Emmenegger)

<div>
<h2>
<span>Working Papers</span>
</h2>
</div> 

- Majority Protection: The Origins of Distorted Proportional Representation (with Patrick Emmenegger)
- A Socialist Threat? Interparty Coordination and the Electoral Success of Social Democratic Candidates under Majoritarian Rule 
- The Social Origins of Christian Democracy. Rural-Urban Migration, the Socialist Threat, and the Rise of the Catholic Workers’ Movement

<div>
<h2>
<span>Work in Progress</span>
</h2>
</div> 

- The Introduction of PR in Belgium (with Patrick Emmenegger)
- Initiating Welfare Competition. How the Freedom of Movement for the Poor was introduced (with Cecilia Bruzelius)
- Income Tax, Indirect Revenue, and Political Institutions [Working Title] (with Patrick Emmenegger and Lucas Leemann)
- The Adoption of Personal Income Taxation in the Swiss Cantons [Working Title] (with Patrick Emmenegger and Lucas Leemann)
- The Abolition of Feudal Taxation across Europe [Working Title]
- Wasted Votes? Electoral Competition, Vote Defection, and Strategic Third Party Entry in Single Member Districts
- The Black Coalition. Why the German Reich Adopted Social Insurance
- The Origins of Pre-Modern States in World History
